svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="GitHub Copilot" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="arch-lambda" name="Lambda Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1548" dy="834" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell
